question.title: [SYNTHETIC FIXTURE] Will the example agency publish its July data release before 2026-07-16?
question.description: Synthetic fixture question for offline tests. Shaped like a MiniBench binary question; never submitted anywhere.
question.resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the example agency publishes the July release on its website before 2026-07-16 23:59 UTC.
question.fine_print: Publication time is taken from the agency's own release timestamp.
